mapper.select: SELECT A.SCOLLECT_DT -- 수집일자 , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.NBITMASK , A.SCOLLECT_DT_ORIGIN , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ -- 라우팅_비교_결과_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD -- 서비스망_유형_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD -- 본부/국사_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD -- 노드_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ -- 계위_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ -- IP_배정_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ -- IP_할당_MST_SEQ , A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX -- IPMS_IP , A.SIPMS_IP_BLOCK -- IPMS_IP_블록 , A.NIPMS_IP_BITMASK -- IPMS_IP_비트마스크 , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT -- 회선 CNT , A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX -- 라우팅_IP , A.SROUTING_IP_BLOCK -- 라우팅_IP_블록 , A.NROUTING_IP_BITMASK -- 라우팅_IP_비트마스크 , A.SROUTING_USE_YN -- 라우팅_사용_여부 , A.SIP_NEXTHOP -- NEXTHOP , A.SCOMMUNITY -- COMMUNITY , A.SUSE_ROUTING -- 사용장비 , A.SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD -- DB현행화_결과 , A.SSUMMARY_MATCH_YN -- SUMMARY_일치_여부 , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD -- IP_생성_유형_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD -- IPMS_서비스_유형_타입_CD , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , A.SIPMS_USE_YN FROM ( SELECT A.SCOLLECT_DT AS SCOLLECT_DT -- 수집일자 , B.PIP_PREFIX , B.NBITMASK , A.SCOLLECT_DT AS SCOLLECT_DT_ORIGIN , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ -- 라우팅_비교_결과_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD -- 서비스망_유형_CD , G.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SSVC_GROUP_CD -- 본부/국사_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , D.SSVC_OBJ_CD -- 노드_CD , F.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ -- 계위_MST_SEQ , NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) AS NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ -- IP_배정_MST_SEQ , (CASE WHEN A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN A.NIP_CHG_ALLOC_MST_SEQ ELSE A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ END) AS NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ -- IP_할당_MST_SEQ , (CASE WHEN A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN B.PIP_PREFIX ELSE A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX END) AS PIPMS_IP_PREFIX -- IPMS_IP , (CASE WHEN A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN B.SIP_BLOCK ELSE A.SIPMS_IP_BLOCK END) AS SIPMS_IP_BLOCK -- IPMS_IP_블록 , (CASE WHEN A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IS NOT NULL THEN B.NBITMASK ELSE A.NIPMS_IP_BITMASK END) AS NIPMS_IP_BITMASK -- IPMS_IP_비트마스크 , B.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT -- 회선 CNT , A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX -- 라우팅_IP , A.SROUTING_IP_BLOCK -- 라우팅_IP_블록 , A.NROUTING_IP_BITMASK -- 라우팅_IP_비트마스크 , A.SROUTING_USE_YN -- 라우팅_사용_여부 , A.SIP_NEXTHOP -- NEXTHOP , A.SCOMMUNITY -- COMMUNITY , A.SUSE_ROUTING -- 사용장비 , A.SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD , A.SSUMMARY_MATCH_YN -- SUMMARY_일치_여부 , A.SCOMPARE_CD -- 비교_구분(ASSIGN/ALLOC) , B.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD -- IP_생성_유형_CD , B.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD -- IPMS_서비스_유형_타입_CD , B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , (CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0005' OR B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0006' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS SIPMS_USE_YN FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST A -- 라우팅_비교_결과_MST , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B -- IP_배정_MST , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST C -- IP_할당_MST , MST.TB_LVL_MST D -- 계위_MST_수동계위포함 , MST.TB_LVL_CD E -- 국사/조직코드_수동포함 , MST.TB_LVL_CD F -- 국사/조직코드_수동포함 , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD G -- 서비스_망_유형_CD WHERE 1=1 AND (A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ) AND B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) = NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) AND C.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) = NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) AND C.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ(+) = NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ALLOC_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ) AND D.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND E.SLVL_CD(+) = D.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND F.SLVL_CD(+) = D.SSVC_OBJ_CD AND G.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) = D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0003' AND (A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX >>= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ipblock, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) OR A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX <<= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{ipblock, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) ) AND B.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = (CASE WHEN #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = 'public' THEN 'CT0001' WHEN #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} = 'private' THEN 'CT0005' ELSE 'XXX' END) ) A GROUP BY A.SCOLLECT_DT -- 수집일자 , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.NBITMASK , A.SCOLLECT_DT_ORIGIN , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ -- 라우팅_비교_결과_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD -- 서비스망_유형_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD -- 본부/국사_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD -- 노드_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ -- 계위_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ -- IP_배정_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ -- IP_할당_MST_SEQ , A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX -- IPMS_IP , A.SIPMS_IP_BLOCK -- IPMS_IP_블록 , A.NIPMS_IP_BITMASK -- IPMS_IP_비트마스크 , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT -- 회선 CNT , A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX -- 라우팅_IP , A.SROUTING_IP_BLOCK -- 라우팅_IP_블록 , A.NROUTING_IP_BITMASK -- 라우팅_IP_비트마스크 , A.SROUTING_USE_YN -- 라우팅_사용_여부 , A.SIP_NEXTHOP -- NEXTHOP , A.SCOMMUNITY -- COMMUNITY , A.SUSE_ROUTING -- 사용장비 , A.SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD -- DB현행화_결과 , A.SSUMMARY_MATCH_YN -- SUMMARY_일치_여부 , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD -- IP_생성_유형_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD -- IPMS_서비스_유형_타입_CD , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , A.SIPMS_USE_YN
